mnemonics: PANDAS for data wrangling, NUMPY for math, MATPLOTLIB for plots to show
keyPoints: Master data manipulation with Pandas (e.g., filtering, grouping, merging)
Understand NumPy arrays and operations for numerical computations
Create effective visualizations using Matplotlib/Seaborn for data storytelling
commonMistakes: Forgetting to handle missing data (NaN values) before analysis
Using Python lists instead of NumPy arrays for large numerical computations
Creating cluttered or unlabeled plots that lack clear insights
